items.summary: The Civil Rights Cold Case Records Review Board received an additional 451 pages of records from the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) related to two civil rights cold case incidents to which the Review Board assigned the unique identifiers 2023-001-003 and 2023-001-004. items.title: Establishment of Class E Airspace; Crown Point, IN
items.summary: This action establishes Class E airspace at Franciscan Health Crown Point Hospital Heliport, Crown Point, IN. This action supports new instrument procedures and instrument flight rule (IFR) operations.

items.title: Churchill Asset Management LLC
[Agency Information Collection Activities; Proposed eCollection, eComments Requested; Extension of a Previously Approved Collection; TitleLaw Enforcement Public Contact Data Collection
items.summary: Criminal Justice Information Services (CJIS) Division, FBI, Department of Justice (DOJ), will be submitting the following information collection request to the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) for review and approval in accordance with the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995.

items.title: Air Plan Approval; Missouri; Control of NOX Emissions From Large Stationary Internal Combustion Engines
items.summary: The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is proposing to approve revisions to the Missouri State Implementation Plan (SIP) related to Control of Nitrogen Oxide (NOX) Emissions From Large Stationary Internal Combustion Engines. The revisions reformat and revise reporting, recordkeeping, and complian

items.title: Approval of Source-Specific Air Quality Implementation Plan; New York; Castleton Power, LLC
items.summary: Pursuant to applicable requirements under the Clean Air Act (CAA or the Act), the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is proposing to approve a revision to the State of New York's State Implementation Plan (SIP) for the ozone National Ambient Air Quality Standard (NAAQS) related to a source-specif

items.title: Airworthiness Directives; Rolls-Royce Deutschland Ltd & Co KG Engines
items.summary: The FAA proposes to adopt a new airworthiness directive (AD) for all Rolls-Royce Deutschland Ltd & Co KG (RRD) Model BR700-725A1-12 engines. This proposed AD was prompted by the manufacturer revising the airworthiness limitations section (ALS) of the existing time limits manual (TLM) to introduce ne

items.title: Air Plan Approval; Wisconsin; Source-Specific Air Quality Implementation Plan; Oak Creek Power Plant
items.summary: The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is proposing to approve a revision to the State of Wisconsin's State Implementation Plan (SIP) for the Oak Creek Power Plant located in Oak Creek, Wisconsin. The EPA is proposing to approve alternative nitrogen oxides (NOX) emissions limits for the Oak Creek

items.title: Adjusting Imports of Commercial Aircraft, Jet Engines, and Aircraft and Engine Parts Into the United States
欧盟小包关税新规正式生效
items.summary: 自2026年7月1日起，欧盟取消对价值低于150欧元的小额包裹的关税豁免政策，改为统一征收3欧元的临时固定关税。2026年11月起额外加收2欧元清关处理费。

items.title: 美国CPSC电子申报(eFiling)强制实施
items.summary: 自2026年7月8日起，所有受CPSC监管的进口消费品须通过ACE系统完成电子备案，涵盖玩具、小家电等约600个HTS编码商品，无货值豁免。

items.title: 美国Section 301新调查：强迫劳动相关60经济体加征关税
items.summary: USTR于6月2日发布调查报告，拟对相关经济体加征10%-12.5%额外关税，7月24日前将有最终裁定。同时Section 122附加税将于7月24日到期。

items.title: 美国加州纺织品回收法案强制执行
items.summary: 2026年7月1日起强制执行，全球年营业额≥100万美元的纺织品生产者须通过PRO组织Landbell USA完成注册申报。

items.title: 德国强制3C电器展示回收标识
items.summary: 2026年7月1日起，《电气和电子设备法》(ElektroG)第二次修正案正式生效，强化生产者责任延伸制度。

items.title: 欧盟商品维修指令7月31日全面落地
items.summary: 欧盟委员会宣布商品维修指令将于2026年7月31日起全面落地实施，要求生产商提供更长期的维修支持。

items.title: 新加坡严管跨境网购受管制电器
items.summary: 自2026年7月1日起，个人及企业进口受管制家用电器须符合最低能效性能标准(MEPS)并提前通过线上申请注册。

items.title: Section 122附加税将于7月24日到期
items.summary: 美国《1974年贸易法》Section 122下的10%临时附加税将于7月24日到期，届时大多数进口商品将恢复WTO MFN关税税率。
